input.content:
Hariom Retail Pvt. Ltd. Hariom Electronics started its showroom in Kamla Nagar, Delhi 110007, by Shri Sunil Juneja in 1984. Hari Om Retail Pvt Ltd is a system driven, multi-brand consumer electronics and multi-location Retail Stores organization selling consumer electronics IT and mobile products which provides customer-focused solutions.
Hariom values a Culture of Honesty and Reliability. Its principles are- what goes around comes around. Believes in the theory of KARMA. Our vision is to cater 80% of consumers' household needs. Hari Om's management mission is to send happy people home, whether its customers, employees or any other associates of Hariom Electronics. So that they come back to Hariom again and again.
Hariom Electronics is a trusted name in home and kitchen appliances, committed to delivering quality products at the best prices. With years of experience in the electronics retail industry, we proudly serve our customers with genuine brands, competitive offers, and dependable after-sales support.
At Hariom Electronics, customer satisfaction is our top priority. Our knowledgeable team is always ready to guide you in choosing the right product that suits your needs and budget. Visit our store or connect with us online to experience reliable service and exciting deals under one roof.
At Hariom Electronics, we believe every home deserves the best appliances at the right price. We are proud to serve our community with trusted brands, exciting offers, and honest guidance. Our team is always ready to help you compare products, understand features, and choose wisely. Your satisfaction is our success, and we look forward to being your trusted electronics partner.

input.subject: Complaint: iPhone Screen Replacement Not Received – Under Warranty
input.context: I am writing to complain about my iPhone screen replacement. The replacement was supposed to arrive but it did not come. My iPhone is under warranty and I need this issue resolved urgently.

input.content:
To: Apple Support Team
From: Abbas
Subject: Complaint: iPhone Screen Replacement Not Received – Under Warranty

Dear Apple Support Team,

I am writing to formally complain about my iPhone screen replacement. My iPhone is under warranty and I was promised a screen replacement, but it has not arrived as expected.

This is causing significant inconvenience as I am unable to use my phone properly. I kindly request that you look into this matter urgently and arrange for the replacement to be delivered or schedule an appointment at the nearest Apple service centre.

Please let me know the status of my request and the next steps.

Thank you for your time, and I look forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,
Abbas
input.instruction: Make it a clear complaint email about a promised iPhone screen replacement that didn't arrive. Keep it polite but firm since the phone is under warranty.

# CERTIFICATE OF EXPERIENCE

**Date:** [Current Date]

---

**To Whom It May Concern,**

This is to certify that **Mr. John [Last Name]** was employed with **Hyperzod** from **[Start Date]** to **[End Date]**, for a period of **5 (five) years**.

## Position Held
**Junior Web Developer**

## Roles & Responsibilities
During his tenure, John consistently demonstrated exceptional technical skills, professionalism, and dedication. His key contributions included:

- Developing and maintaining responsive web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks.
- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver projects on time and within scope.
- Debugging and resolving technical issues across frontend and backend systems.
- Participating in code reviews and contributing to team best practices.
- Assisting in the migration and optimization of legacy systems.
- Demonstrating excellent problem-solving abilities and a strong willingness to learn.

## Personal Attributes
John is a reliable, hardworking, and valuable team member. He carries a positive attitude, takes initiative, and works well both independently and as part of a team.

## Conclusion
We found John to be an asset to our organization. He leaves Hyperzod with our best wishes and full endorsement for his future professional endeavors.

---

For any further verification, please contact the undersigned.

**Sincerely,**

_________________________
**[HR Manager's Name]**
**Human Resources Department**
**Hyperzod**
